Ashwini: Quick, pioneering, associated with healing and fast action.
Bharani: Transformative, intense, and bearing burdens or responsibilities.
Krittika: Sharp, purifying, analytical, and cutting through illusions.
Rohini: Growth, fertility, beauty, and material manifestation.
Mrigashira: Searching, curious, restless, and constantly exploring.
Ardra: Stormy, destructive of the old to make way for the new, intellectual.
Punarvasu: Renewal, restoration, and returning to safety or light.
Pushya: Nurturing, spiritual growth, very auspicious for most activities.
Ashlesha: Intense, mystical, potentially manipulative but deeply insightful.
Magha: Royal, connected to ancestors, authoritative and proud.
Purva Phalguni: Creative, relaxing, enjoyment of life and relationships.
Uttara Phalguni: Patronage, helping others, lasting relationships and contracts.
Hasta: Skilled with hands, detail-oriented, grasping and acquiring.
Chitra: Brilliant, designing, artistic, and creating form.
Anuradha: Devoted, successful in foreign lands, exploring the hidden.
Jyeshtha: Senior, protective, dealing with authority or eldest sibling issues.
Mula: Rooted, investigative, destroying foundations to find truth.
Uttara Ashadha: Universal leadership, unchallenged victory, highly responsible.
Shravana: Listening, learning, oral tradition and acquiring knowledge.
Dhanishta: Wealthy, rhythmic, musical, and highly influential.
Shatabhisha: Healing, secretive, hundred physicians, treating complex issues.
Purva Bhadrapada: Fiery, passionate, focused on spiritual or transformative goals.
Uttara Bhadrapada: Deep, stable, wise, dealing with subconscious realms.
Revati: Wealthy, protective, guiding others, the final culmination.
